item.name: Health
item.description: Read-only health check. Does not create a session, but returns the existing cookie if one is already present.

request.description: Checks service health without sending a session cookie.
Run after any POST endpoint that set X-Session-Id. Postman sends the cookie automatically for the same host.

item.name: Session
item.description: Anonymous Redis-backed session management from Lab 2.

request.description: Creates a new anonymous session when no valid X-Session-Id cookie is present.
Run after POST /session (create). The existing session should be refreshed.

item.name: Users
item.description: User registration flow. Recommended order: create, duplicate, invalid field.

request.description: Creates a new user, hashes password with bcrypt, creates a new session, and binds it to the user.
Run after POST /users (create). Should return conflict and refresh the existing session if present.
Returns a validation error for an empty required field.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication flow. Recommended order: login success, invalid credentials, logout.

request.description: Authenticates a user and binds the current session to user_id, or creates a new session if needed.
Checks invalid credentials path and confirms the active session is still returned.

exec: pm.test("Cookie removal header is present", function () {

request.description: Deletes the current Redis session and expires X-Session-Id cookie.
Run after cookie cleanup or in a clean cookie jar. Logout requires an authenticated session.

item.name: Events
item.description: Event creation and listing. Recommended order: unauthorized, login, create, duplicate, list, invalid parameter.

request.description: Run after logout or in a clean cookie jar. Creating events must require an authorized session.
Run after successful login. Creates a new event document in MongoDB.
Run after POST /events (create). Checks unique title constraint.
Checks validation for finished_at earlier than started_at.

exec: pm.test("Response contains event id and title", function () {

request.description: Lab 4: fetches a single event by id. Run after POST /events (create) saved eventId.
Lab 4: checks 404 response for an unknown event id.
Lab 4: run in a clean cookie jar or after logout. Editing events requires an authenticated organizer session.
Lab 4: updates category, price and city for the event created by the current organizer. Requires an authenticated session.
Lab 4: rejects a category value outside the allowed enum.
Lab 4: empty city string removes events.location.city from the event.
Lab 4: editing an unknown event (or an event that belongs to another organizer) returns 404.

exec: pm.test("Each event has reactions counters", function () {

request.description: Lab 5: GET /events returns reactions object on every event when include=reactions is set.
Lab 5: GET /events/:id returns reactions when include=reactions is set.
Lab 5: run in a clean cookie jar or after logout. Liking events requires an authenticated user.
Lab 5: authenticated user likes the event. Repeated call is idempotent — it just updates created_at in Cassandra.
Lab 5: switching from a like to a dislike updates the same Cassandra row (one reaction per user per event).
Lab 5: reacting to an unknown event id returns 404.

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Lab 6: reviews for events backed by Cassandra and Redis. Recommended order: unauthorized, create, duplicate, list, update, list with reviews include.

request.description: Lab 6: leaving a review requires an authenticated user.
Lab 6: authenticated user leaves a review. Stores the new review id in the collection variable.
Lab 6: a user is allowed only one review per event.
Lab 6: rating must be an integer between 1 and 5 inclusive.
Lab 6: returns 404 when there is no such event.

Lab 6: editing a review requires an authenticated owner of the review.

item.name: Recommendations
item.description: Lab 7: рекомендации мероприятий на основе графа лайков в Neo4j. Recommended order: unauthorized, authorize (login), get recommendations.

request.description: Lab 7: получение рекомендаций требует авторизованной сессии.
Lab 7: авторизованный пользователь получает список рекомендованных мероприятий. Кэшируется в Redis на APP_RECOMMENDATIONS_TTL секунд.
